pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh logic referencing ROCKETS_DIR defined in task_utils.sh.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh logic referencing EXPORTS_DIR defined in task_utils.sh.
Confirmed via expected output path in verifier.py and export_result.sh.
Confirmed via SOURCE_ORK path in setup_task.sh.
Confirmed via verifier.py timestep matching logic.
Confirmed via hardcoded pass_threshold logic in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real, human-designed 'three_stage_low_power_rocket.ork' example from the OpenRocket software package. The initial rocket file is copied to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/sensitivity_study.ork'. The verifier explicitly checks that simulations have been created with time steps of [0.1, 0.05, 0.01], that at least three corresponding CSV export files exist, and that a text report is written to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/sensitivity_report.txt'. A passing score requires at least 70 points out of 100 based on these criteria.
